<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox skin preset
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
<% if (it.nameModifier) { -%>
|name_modifier=<%~ it.nameModifier %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.nameModifierColor) { -%>
|name_modifier_color=<%~ it.nameModifierColor %>
<% } -%>
|show_name_in_stats=<%~ it.showNameInStats %>
<% if (it.modifierCount) { -%>
|modifier_count=<%= it.modifierCount %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.usedByCount) { -%>
|used_by_count=<%= it.usedByCount %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />
<% if (it.hasModifiers) { %>
<section begin="modifiers" />
<%~ it.modifiersSection -%>
<section end="modifiers" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasUsedBy) { %>
<section begin="used_by" />
<%~ it.usedBySection -%>
<section end="used_by" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Skin Presets]]
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated skin preset source pages]]
